scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/web" "npm run dev -w apps/api"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/web && npm run build -w apps/api
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run setup -w packages/db
scripts.test: npm run test -w apps/api && npm run test -w apps/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/web && npm run lint -w apps/api
